title: SecurityAgent Configuration
description: Schema for the Security Agent's HMAC validation, rate limiting, and anomaly detection settings.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for HMAC signature verification.

header_name.description: HTTP header containing the HMAC signature.

secret_env_var.description: Environment variable name holding the HMAC secret key.

rate_limiting.description: Rate limiting configuration for public-facing endpoints.

window_seconds.description: Time window in seconds for rate limit evaluation.

max_requests.description: Maximum requests allowed per window per source IP.

failed_signature_threshold.description: Number of failed signature checks before raising a high threat level.

threat_levels.description: Ordered list of threat severity levels.
